context_for_next_testing_agent: TecnicoCierreReparacion component fully implemented with all requested features. Backend whitelist includes all new QC fields. State transitions to IRREPARABLE and REPARADO work correctly. Component only renders in OrdenTecnico.jsx (tecnico view) when order is in en_taller state and not blocked. Prerequisites required: diagnostico_tecnico, ri_completada, cpi_opcion. To test UI fully, need an order with all prerequisites met.
